title: Minimum Viable Relationships (MVR) Framework (Version 3): Relational Readiness for High-Context Markets
description: Version 3.0.6 of the Minimum Viable Relationships (MVR) Framework by Farouk Mark Mukiibi. In high-context markets, ventures fail not because products lack utility, but because they lack relational permission. This repository is preserved as an indexed V3 research archive. Current MVR API, OpenAPI, MCP, sandbox, and agent-discovery surfaces are maintained at https://github.com/africanmarketos591/mvr-framework and https://africanmarketos.com/api/openapi.agent.json.

creators.name: Mukiibi, Farouk Mark
creators.affiliation: African Market OS / Gatsby Marketing Agency

notes: Canonical title kept stable for indexing. Originally published as 'Minimum Viable Relationships (MVR) Framework: Africa's Prerequisite to MVP' (Zenodo DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17054819). Current machine-callable API: https://africanmarketos.com/api/openapi.agent.json. MCP Registry server: io.github.africanmarketos591/mvr-api.
